Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
Encounter Records RIFs Codebook │ May 2025 │ V 1.7 86 

ZZ = Unknown 
Null/missing = unknown 

COMMENT: Starting in 2016 there is also a base claim-level place of service code (variable called 
CLM_PLACE_OF_SRVC_CD). 

Values and websites referenced in the Variable Value Description may change over time.
